description: 38 - 22-07-2024 - Emails between Peter Mandelson (whilst at Global Counsel), Douglas Alexander (former Minister of State, DBT) and further Global Counsel employee
text:
(former Minister of State, DBT) and further Global Counsel employee

From: Douglas Alexander « Rersonal

Date: 22 July 2024 at 15:27:52 BST

To: Peter Mandelson « Personal

Cc: Third Party Third Party Subject:

Re: Intro

Peter, thanks for the introduction.
Third Party, oq to e-meet. I'll email you separately to find a slot that suits.
Best wishes, Douglas

On Mon, Jul 22, 2024 at 8:17 AM Peter Mandelson Personal wrote:
Douglas, Third Party

‘As Douglas is now going to try and push trade policy up hill on behalf of our great nation, | really think you
two should meet and talk asap. Over to you.

P

Sent from my iPhone

Disclaimer. This email and any attachments to it may be confidential and are intended solely for the use of
the individual to whom it is addressed. Any views or opinions expressed are solely those of the author and
do not necessarily represent those of Global Counsel. If you are not the intended recipient of this email,
you must neither take any action based upon its contents, nor copy or show it to anyone. Please contact
the sender if you believe you have received this email in error. This email and its content are copyright ©
of Global Counsel and protected under UK and international law. All rights reserved. For the definition of
Global Counsel please visit: https://www.global-counsel.com/disclaimer

121

From: Peter Mandelson 
Date: 10 October 2024 at 09:45:39 BST 
To: "Douglas Alexander 
Subject: High investment economy 
Douglas, 
In the lead up to the government's investment summit and the Budget, I am attaching a lecture 
I am delivering in Edinburgh today which makes the case for prioritising investment over 
consumption, creating a 'growth conscience' in everything the government does and using 
industrial strategy as a transmission belt between the UK's world class, research intensive 
universities and the rest of the economy. 
I hope you find it interesting. 
Very best 
Peter 
Lord Mandelson 
Chairman 
A: 5 Welbeck Street, London, W1 G 9YQ 
2 attachments 
GG 
image001.png
6K 
Global Counsel 
t@ Edinburgh economic lecture final .docx
55K 
@global_counsel 
Personal
Personal
122
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
